subject: Project Management
title: The Future of Project Management
description: A quick win: understand The Future of Project Management.

hook.text: AI can now generate schedules, predict risks, and flag overdue tasks faster than any human.

buildup.text: Tools like Copilot and GPT write project plans, status reports, and stakeholder emails.

discovery.text: Remote work and async communication have redefined what 'managing a project' means.

twist.text: Yet the biggest failures still come from the same cause: people not talking to each other.

climax.text: Technology changes the tools. The human challenges of coordination remain exactly the same.

punchline.text: The future of PM is still about people, not software.

quiz.question: What remains the biggest cause of project failure despite new technology?
